title: BaseModelRoot
content:
# BaseModelRoot


Base data-model with sequence methods.


## Methods


### __init__(root: list[P]) -> None


### index(value: P, start: int, stop: int | None) -> int

Return the index of the first occurrence of value.


### count(value: P) -> int

Return the number of occurrences of value.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.base_model.__init__()
